name: AUTO-MONTHLY-REVIEW — 1st of Month 09:00 Business Review
_hci_notes: AUTO-MONTHLY-REVIEW — Runs 1st of each month at 09:00. Pulls mission-control + autonomy/report + weekly/company in parallel. Builds monthly business review markdown covering portfolio health, AI ROI, mission status, top automation opportunities. Writes to reports/monthly/exec-review-YYYY-MM.md. Pushes ntfy with elevated priority when projects at risk or missions blocked.
